initiatives.name: Shasta Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in Shasta County, including Redding. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective care.

initiatives.name: UNHARM
initiatives.description: A harm reduction and mutual aid collective serving the Shasta region, including Redding. They provide direct support, resource distribution, and community care while building networks of solidarity through harm reduction practices and collective organizing.
